title: clinopodium nepeta subsp. conillii
intro: Clinopodium nepeta subsp. conillii, also known as Catalan calamintha or Catalan Clinopodium, is a subspecies of the Clinopodium nepeta plant, belonging to the mint family and native to the Mediterranean region. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium nepeta subsp. conillii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe menstrual cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy among traditional healers. Clinopodium nepeta subsp. conillii can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into a variety of herbal treatments.
